summary.benchmark: Lewsearch public n=10,000 synthetic panel benchmark
public_release_notes: Contains public benchmark questions, cited public ground truth, and aggregate Lewsearch predictions.
Does not include training data, private agent records, API keys, router thresholds, raw agent-level probabilities, or production code.
Customer studies do not carry third-party ground truth; benchmark MAE is a validation proxy, not a guarantee for any single custom question.
